name: signet.js
description: A TypeScript library for handling multi-chain transactions and signatures using Signet MPC

scripts.test: pnpm test:evm && pnpm test:btc && pnpm test:cosmos
scripts.test:evm: pnpm exec hardhat node --config hardhat.config.mts & NODE_PID=$!; sleep 2 && vitest run src/chain-adapters/EVM/EVM.test.ts; kill $NODE_PID
scripts.test:btc: docker compose -f docker/bitcoin/docker-compose.yml up -d && vitest run src/chain-adapters/Bitcoin/Bitcoin.test.ts; docker compose -f docker/bitcoin/docker-compose.yml down -v
scripts.test:cosmos: docker rm -f cosmos-node 2>/dev/null; docker build -t cosmos-local docker/cosmos && docker run -d --name cosmos-node -p 26657:26657 -p 1317:1317 cosmos-local && until curl -s http://localhost:26657/status 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"latest_block_height":"[1-9]'; do sleep 2; done && vitest run src/chain-adapters/Cosmos/Cosmos.test.ts; docker rm -f cosmos-node
scripts.test:evm:e2e: pnpm exec hardhat node --config hardhat.config.mts & NODE_PID=$!; sleep 2 && vitest run tests/e2e/evm/EVM.e2e.test.ts; kill $NODE_PID
scripts.test:btc:e2e: docker compose -f docker/bitcoin/docker-compose.yml up -d && vitest run tests/e2e/btc/BTC.e2e.test.ts; docker compose -f docker/bitcoin/docker-compose.yml down -v
scripts.test:cosmos:e2e: docker rm -f cosmos-node 2>/dev/null; docker build -t cosmos-local docker/cosmos && docker run -d --name cosmos-node -p 26657:26657 -p 1317:1317 cosmos-local && until curl -s http://localhost:26657/status 2>/dev/null | grep -q '"latest_block_height":"[1-9]'; do sleep 2; done && vitest run tests/e2e/cosmos/Cosmos.e2e.test.ts; docker rm -f cosmos-node
scripts.publish-npm: npm run build && npm run docs:build && npm publish
scripts.publish-npm:beta: npm run build && npm run docs:build && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version --force && npm run publish-npm
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version --force && npm run publish-npm
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version --force && npm run publish-npm
scripts.release:beta: npm version prerelease --preid=beta --no-git-tag-version --force && npm run publish-npm:beta

author: Sig Network
